strengths: 6+ years as a full-stack engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js experience across multiple senior roles, directly matching the primary stack requirement
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq actively building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Polyglot proficiency across TypeScript, Java, C/C++, Python-adjacent ecosystems plus hands-on experience with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes covering the full required toolchain
concerns: Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js, Vitest, or React in depth (React appears only briefly at Optilyz)
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; database experience skews toward MongoDB and MySQL
Kotlin is not explicitly listed, though strong Java background provides a close adjacent skill

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, testing leadership)

response.justification: This candidate is an exceptionally strong fit: a Staff-level full-stack engineer with well over a decade of experience, currently building exactly the kind of AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling the role calls for. The primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) is well-represented across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq, and the candidate brings rare polyglot range (Java, C/C++, DLang, Swift) plus a documented track record of running workshops on testing, Selenium, and web internals — signaling the communication, mentorship, and craftsmanship the role values.
